executives.name: Katharina McFarland
executives.background: Former Assistant Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and former President of the Defense Acquisition University. Expert in defense acquisition and technology.

executives.name: Lynn Dugle
executives.background: Ms. Dugle was the CEO and President of Engility Holdings, Inc. and held senior leadership positions at Raytheon Company.
